name: DeveloperChangeLog
description: Source of truth for tracking all development activity in this application. Every feature, bug fix, configuration change, data fix, and rollback is recorded here. This entity is managed exclusively through the Developer Module's Change Management section and provides a permanent, auditable history of what was changed, when, by whom, and why.

title.description: Short descriptive title of the change.

description.description: Detailed description of the change, its purpose, and expected impact.

affected_areas.description: Areas of the application affected by this change (e.g. 'Payroll, Employee Sync, Reports').

implemented_by.description: Name or email of the person who implemented the change.

implemented_date.description: Date when the change was implemented.

notes.description: Additional notes, observations, or follow-up items related to this change.

created_by.description: Email of the user who created this entry. Auto-set on save.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this entry was created. Auto-set on save.
